facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this café. A riverside coffee, tea, and books spot on TL47 that feels nothing like the resort strip. 4.7 stars from 81 reviews means the people who find it keep coming back. Grab a book off the shelf, order something slow, and watch the river move. This is the Phu Quoc your itinerary didn't plan for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: River out the window. Book in hand. Coffee on the table. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is what a slow morning in Phu Quoc actually looks like. 4.7 stars and most tourists never find it.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about this riverside café. 4.7 stars, books on the shelves, river out the window. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Riverside seat. Open book. No tourist crowds. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc hits different at 8am.
